content:
**July 21, 2026**

Built quite a lot into Continuum’s Feeds over the past 24 hours.


NostrVerse gives me a broader view across everyone Continuum has discovered.

Following shows recent notes, reposts, and articles from my complete Nostr follow list.

Curated gives me a focused feed made from people I deliberately choose—not simply everyone I follow.


https://media.mycontinuum.xyz/2026/pro/nostr/npub19wvckp8z58lxs4djuz43pwujka6tthaq77yjd3axttsgppnj0ersgdguvd/images/screen-shot-2026-07-21-at-9-34-18-pm.png


All three use the same coherent interface, can refresh from relays, retain events locally, and remain browsable even when Continuum is offline.

This is what I mean when I say Continuum is not merely another Nostr client. It lets me create different lenses through which to see the same growing body of locally retained history—without surrendering that history to whichever client or platform I happen to use today.


Still building. But yes, this is beginning to look rather slick. 😇



#Continuum #Nostr #LocalFirst #DigitalSovereignty #BuildInPublic
